title: Eva 30 Asuka short Asukas declaration as pilot of Unit 02
display_title: Eva 30 Asuka short Asukas declaration as pilot of Unit 02
wikitext:
[]: Eva +30 Asuka short - Asuka's declaration as pilot of Unit 02             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Sat Feb 28, 2026 11:44 am Watching the Asuka 30th anniversary special, it seems pretty obvious that Asuka Sohryu (the original) disliked her End of Evangelion ending, what with the choking and "kimochi warui." She did not really have an ending in the TV series. After going through all sorts of different scenarios which are happier, including an idealized family life with Shinji, she turns them all down because she's done relying on dreams and wants to create her own happiness with the cards she's been dealt. I interpreted this not as a rejection of Shinji and a family with him per se, but a rejection of using whatever Asuka Shikinami's offering her (I assume instrumentality) as a crutch to avoid dealing with reality. That reality would be "One More Final - I Need You" because...there really is nothing else it could be. She then declares herself a protector of her world and Unit 02's pilot. I agree with the protector part, but....her Unit 02 was destroyed already, along with its core, before her real ending. How is she going to be a Eva pilot if her Eva no longer exists? Maybe she should have said "my Eva may be gone, but I'm still a warrior and a protector!" I don't know, is this a simple continuity error Anno made? Don't get me wrong, I loved the short WAAAAAY more than I thought I would, this little detail has bothered me.

[]: Re: Eva +30 Asuka short - Asuka's declaration as pilot of Unit 02             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Feb 28, 2026 11:59 pm I find it far-fetched to believe that Anno forgot. The destruction of Unit 02 in EoE is one of its immortal, visceral moments. I'd tend to take her statement in the same way that veterans are soldiers by temperament forever. I mean, the entire phenomenon of PTSD is the more tragic outcome of permanently assuming a role, but the more 'normal' version is how soldiers upon return experience everything in civilian life different from civilians. They will still case roads as they drive, often finding it hard to settle down from an alert mode, taking mental checks on surroundings, etc. It wouldn't be abnormal at all, given her character, for her to identify as a role that's no longer possible. Artists still identify as artists even if arthritis removes their ability to mold clay and they never make another mug again.

[]: Re: Eva +30 Asuka short - Asuka's declaration as pilot of Unit 02             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Mar 02, 2026 11:17 am It's an abstract, meta short. She is the pilot of Eva-02 cause that's what the character is. We'll always know her as that. She just accepts what she wanted was right there. Similar to Shinji in Instrumentality. Just needed to value it/herself.

[]: Re: Eva +30 Asuka short - Asuka's declaration as pilot of Unit 02             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Mar 13, 2026 7:38 pm Watching the Asuka 30th anniversary special, it seems pretty obvious that Asuka Sohryu (the original) disliked her End of Evangelion ending, what with the choking and "kimochi warui.
